pageContext.name: Zuko
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Dark Horse Comics, in partnership with Nickelodeon, are proud to announce Zuko from the high-end figure line based on the hit series Avatar: The Last Airbender.   This deluxe hand-painted plastic figure features his ability to manipulate his elemental, known as bending. The base also features the symbol of his respective bending style.  Firebending master and prince of Fire Nation, Zuko, was originally the bitter enemy of the Avatar and his friends. After much internal struggle and turmoil, he comes to reject his father's ideal of conquering the nations of the world. Now a lifelong friend and mentor to the Avatar, he strives to end the war and restore the honor of the Fire Nation.  Anime fans don't miss your chance to add this Zuko figure to your collection today!
